Title: Session Terminations by Destination User
Description: Displays Session Terminations based on user
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <title>Session Terminations</title>

 <input type="multiselect" token="user_tok" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Select user(s)</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <default>*</default>

  <prefix>(</prefix>

  <suffix>)</suffix>

  <valuePrefix>User_Logoff.user="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <fieldForLabel>user</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>user</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=User_Sessions where nodename=User_Logoff by User_Logoff.user | rename User_Logoff.user as user</query>

  <earliest>-30d@d</earliest>

  <latest>now</latest>

  </search>

  </input>

  <input type="multiselect" token="dest_tok" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Destination machine</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <default>*</default>

  <prefix>(</prefix>

  <suffix>)</suffix>

  <valuePrefix>User_Logoff.dest="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <fieldForLabel>dest</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>dest</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=User_Sessions where nodename=User_Logoff by User_Logoff.dest | rename User_Logoff.dest as dest</query>

  <earliest>-30d@d</earliest>

  <latest>now</latest>

  </search>

  </input>

  <chart>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=User_Sessions where nodename=User_Logoff $user_tok$ $dest_tok$ by User_Logoff.user, User_Logoff.dest, _time span=1s | rename User_Logoff.user as user User_Logoff.dest as dest | eval dest_user=user."@".dest | chart limit=15 span=60m count over _time by dest_user useother=f</query>

  <earliest>$time.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  <option name="charting.axisLabelsX.majorLabelStyle.overflowMode">ellipsisNone</option>

  <option name="charting.axisLabelsX.majorLabelStyle.rotation">-45</option>

  <option name="charting.axisLabelsY.majorUnit">1</option>

  <option name="charting.axisTitleX.visibility">collapsed</option>

  <option name="charting.axisTitleY.visibility">collapsed</option>

  <option name="charting.axisTitleY2.visibility">visible</option>

  <option name="charting.axisX.abbreviation">none</option>

  <option name="charting.axisX.scale">linear</option>

  <option name="charting.axisY.abbreviation">none</option>

  <option name="charting.axisY.scale">linear</option>

  <option name="charting.axisY2.abbreviation">none</option>

  <option name="charting.axisY2.enabled">0</option>

  <option name="charting.axisY2.scale">inherit</option>

  <option name="charting.chart">column</option>

  <option name="charting.chart.bubbleMaximumSize">50</option>

  <option name="charting.chart.bubbleMinimumSize">10</option>

  <option name="charting.chart.bubbleSizeBy">area</option>

  <option name="charting.chart.nullValueMode">gaps</option>

  <option name="charting.chart.showDataLabels">none</option>

  <option name="charting.chart.sliceCollapsingThreshold">0.01</option>

  <option name="charting.chart.stackMode">default</option>

  <option name="charting.chart.style">shiny</option>

  <option name="charting.drilldown">none</option>

  <option name="charting.layout.splitSeries">0</option>

  <option name="charting.layout.splitSeries.allowIndependentYRanges">0</option>

  <option name="charting.legend.labelStyle.overflowMode">ellipsisMiddle</option>

  <option name="charting.legend.mode">standard</option>

  <option name="charting.legend.placement">bottom</option>

  <option name="charting.lineWidth">2</option>

  <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>

  <option name="trellis.enabled">0</option>

  <option name="trellis.scales.shared">1</option>

  <option name="trellis.size">medium</option>

  </chart>

  </panel>

Title: Session Termination - Table
Description: Displays a table of Session Terminations by User and Destination
XML Definition: Session Terminations All * ( ) User_Logoff.user=" " OR user user | tstats count from datamodel=User_Sessions where nodename=User_Logoff by User_Logoff.user | rename User_Logoff.user as user -30d@d now All * ( ) User_Logoff.dest=" " OR dest dest | tstats count from datamodel=User_Sessions where nodename=User_Logoff by User_Logoff.dest | rename User_Logoff.dest as dest -30d@d now | tstats count from datamodel=User_Sessions where nodename=User_Logoff $user_tok$ $dest_tok$ by User_Logoff.user, User_Logoff.dest, _time span=1s | eval Time=strftime(_time,"%m/%d/%y %H:%M:%S") | rename User_Logoff.user as User User_Logoff.dest as Destination | table Time User Destination | sort -Time $time.earliest$ $time.latest$

Title: Account Activity Overview - 20 Most Common Account Management Events
Description: Displays 20 most common account management events
XML Definition: Account Activity Overview - 20 Most Common Account Management Events | tstats count from datamodel=Change where nodename=All_Changes.Account_Management by All_Changes.result, All_Changes.dest, All_Changes.user | rename All_Changes.user as user, All_Changes.result as subject, All_Changes.dest as host | eventstats sum(count) as percent | eval percent=round(count*100/percent,2) | stats sum(count) as count by subject, host, user, percent | table subject, host, user, count, percent | sort 20 -count | rename subject as Subject, host as Host, user as User, count as Count, percent as Percent $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Account Activity - 20 Least Common Account Management Events
Description: Displays 20 least common account management events
XML Definition: Account Activity - 20 Least Common Account Management Events | tstats count from datamodel=Change where nodename=All_Changes.Account_Management by All_Changes.result, All_Changes.dest, All_Changes.user | rename All_Changes.user as user, All_Changes.result as subject, All_Changes.dest as host | eventstats sum(count) as percent | eval percent=round(count*100/percent,2) | stats sum(count) as count by subject, host, user, percent | table subject, host, user, count, percent | sort 20 count | rename subject as Subject, host as Host, user as User, count as Count, percent as Percent $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Account Creation Activity by Host
Description: Displays account creation activity by host
XML Definition: Account Creation Activity by Host | tstats count from datamodel=Change where All_Changes.action=created All_Changes.Account_Management.src_user=* by All_Changes.user, All_Changes.Account_Management.src_user, All_Changes.action, All_Changes.dest | rename All_Changes.Account_Management.src_user as src_user, All_Changes.user as user, All_Changes.action as action, All_Changes.dest as host | table host action, user, src_user | rename host as Host, action as Action user as User, src_user as "Performing User" $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Account Deletion Activity by Host
Description: Displays account deletion activity by host
XML Definition: Account Deletion Activity by Host | tstats count from datamodel=Change where All_Changes.action=deleted All_Changes.Account_Management.src_user=* by All_Changes.user, All_Changes.Account_Management.src_user All_Changes.action All_Changes.dest | rename All_Changes.user as user, All_Changes.Account_Management.src_user as src_user, All_Changes.action as action, All_Changes.dest as host | table host action, user, src_user | rename host as Host, action as Action user as User, src_user as "Performing User" $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: 20 Most Common Mac Addresses
Description: Displays a table of 20 most common MAC addresses
XML Definition: 20 Most Common Mac Addresses | tstats count from datamodel=Network_Traffic where nodename=All_Traffic by All_Traffic.dest_mac All_Traffic.user | sort 20 -count | rename "All_Traffic.dest_mac" as "Mac Destination", "All_Traffic.user" as User, count as Count $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: 20 Least Common Mac Addresses
Description: Displays a table of 20 least common MAC addresses

XML Definition: Success Logins - All Accounts | tstats count from datamodel=Authentication where nodename=Authentication.Successful_Authentication by Authentication.user, Authentication.src, Authentication.dest, _time | rename Authentication.src as "Source IP", Authentication.user as User Authentication.dest as "Destination IP" | stats count as Count by User, "Source IP", "Destination IP" $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Role Based Access Control by User
Description: Role Based Access Control by User
XML Definition: Role Based Access Control by User realname=" " OR realname realname | rest /services/authentication/users | search realname !="" | stats count by realname $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$ * * roles=" " OR roles roles | rest /services/authentication/users | search $user_name_tok$ | stats count by roles $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$ * * capabilities=" " OR capabilities capabilities | rest /services/authentication/users | search $role_tok$ | stats count by capabilities $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$ * * | rest /services/authentication/users | search $user_name_tok$ AND $role_tok$ AND realname != "" | stats count by realname, roles, capabilities | search $capabilities_tok$ | fields - count | rename realname as "Name of User", roles as Roles, capabilities as Capabilities $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Proxy Data by Action
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <input type="dropdown" token="action_tok" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Action</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <default>*</default>

  <prefix>"</prefix>

  <suffix>"</suffix>

  <fieldForLabel>Web.action</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>Web.action</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Web where Web.app="Websense Proxy" by Web.action</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  </input>

  <viz type="sankey_diagram_app.sankey_diagram">

  <title>Proxy Data by Action</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Web where Web.app="Websense Proxy" AND Web.action=$action_tok$ by Web.action, Web.url, Web.src

 | rename Web.src as user Web.action as action Web.url as url

 | eval domain = replace(url, "^(\w+:\/\/?[^\/]+)(.*)","\1/")

 | stats count by user, action, domain

 | appendpipe

  [ stats count by user, action

  | rename user as source, action as target]

 | appendpipe

  [ stats count by action, domain

  | rename action as source, domain as target]

 | search source=*

 | fields source target count</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  <option name="drilldown">none</option>

  <option name="height">751</option>

  <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>

  </viz>

  </panel>

Title: Count of Unprivileged Users with Privileged Accounts
Description: Count of Unprivileged Users with Privileged Accounts
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <title>Count of Unprivileged Users with Privileged Accounts</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Authentication where nodename!=Authentication.Privileged_Authentication by Authentication.user

Title: Remote Access Whitelist - Access Attempts from Whitelisted Sources - Distinct Count
Description: Remote Access Whitelist - Access Attempts from Whitelisted Sources - Distinct Count
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <single>

  <title>Remote Access Whitelist - Access Attempts from Whitelisted Sources - Distinct Count</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Authentication WHERE (Authentication.src!="10.0.0.0/8" AND Authentication.src!="172.16.0.0/12" AND Authentication.src!="127.0.0.0/8" AND Authentication.src!="192.168.0.0/16") by Authentication.src

 | rename Authentication.src as src | lookup whitelist_remote remote_host AS src

 | eval approval_status = if(is_approved ==1, "Whitelisted","Not_Whitelisted")

 | stats sum(count) as count</query>

XML Definition:

  <chart>

  <title>Remote Access Whitelist - Approved vs Unapproved Systems</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Authentication WHERE (Authentication.src!="10.0.0.0/8" AND Authentication.src!="172.16.0.0/12" AND Authentication.src!="127.0.0.0/8" AND Authentication.src!="192.168.0.0/16") by Authentication.src

Title: Phantom Container Events
XML Definition: Phantom Container Events | datamodel Phantom_Remote_Search search | stats count by _time Phantom_Remote_Search.label Phantom_Remote_Search.name Phantom_Remote_Search.severity Phantom_Remote_Search.sensitivity Phantom_Remote_Search.asset Phantom_Remote_Search.status Phantom_Remote_Search.owner Phantom_Remote_Search.create_time Phantom_Remote_Search.end_time | rename Phantom_Remote_Search.label as label Phantom_Remote_Search.name as name Phantom_Remote_Search.severity as severity Phantom_Remote_Search.sensitivity as sensitivity Phantom_Remote_Search.asset as asset Phantom_Remote_Search.status as status Phantom_Remote_Search.owner as owner Phantom_Remote_Search.create_time as start_time Phantom_Remote_Search.end_time as close_time | eval tnow = now() | eval end = if (close_time="null", tnow,strptime(close_time,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") ) | eval start = strptime(start_time,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | eval duration= end -start | eval duration_hour=duration/60/60 | table start_time, label, name, severity, status, owner | rename start_time as "Created At", label as "Label", name as "Description", severity as "Severity", status as "Status", owner as "Owner" $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Percentage of Systems with Vulnerabilities - Based on Enterprise-wide Scan Results
Description: Percentage of Systems with Vulnerabilities - Based on Enterprise-wide Scan Results
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <input type="multiselect" token="severity_tok" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Vulnerability Severity</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <change>

  <set token="title_label">$label$</set>

  </change>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <prefix>(</prefix>

  <suffix>)</suffix>

  <valuePrefix>Vulnerabilities.severity="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <fieldForLabel>Vulnerabilities.severity</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>Vulnerabilities.severity</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Vulnerabilities by Vulnerabilities.severity</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  <default>critical, high</default>

  </input>

  <single>

  <title>Percentage of Systems with Vulnerabilities - Based on Enterprise-wide Scan Results</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats dc(Vulnerabilities.dest) as all_systems_scanned FROM datamodel=Vulnerabilities

 | appendcols [| tstats dc(Vulnerabilities.dest) as vulnerable FROM datamodel=Vulnerabilities where $severity_tok$]

 | eval percent_vuln = (vulnerable/all_systems_scanned)*100

 | top percent_vuln</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  <option name="colorBy">value</option>

  <option name="colorMode">none</option>

  <option name="drilldown">none</option>

  <option name="height">115</option>

  <option name="numberPrecision">0</option>

  <option name="rangeColors">["0x53a051","0x0877a6","0xf8be34","0xf1813f","0xdc4e41"]</option>

XML Definition: All $label$ OR ( ) Vulnerabilities.severity=" " Vulnerabilities.severity Vulnerabilities.severity | tstats count from datamodel=Vulnerabilities by Vulnerabilities.severity $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$ critical, high All * ( ) Vulnerabilities.cve=" " OR Vulnerabilities.cve Vulnerabilities.cve | tstats count from datamodel=Vulnerabilities by Vulnerabilities.dest Vulnerabilities.cve | dedup Vulnerabilities.cve | sort -Vulnerabilities.cve $time_tok_tab.earliest$ $time_tok_tab.latest$ 0 9999 Recent Vulnerabilities Identified - Tabular | tstats count from datamodel=Vulnerabilities where $field1$ by _time Vulnerabilities.dest Vulnerabilities.cve Vulnerabilities.signature Vulnerabilities.cvss | search $cve_tok$ | rename Vulnerabilities.dest as Host Vulnerabilities.cve as CVE Vulnerabilities.signature as Signature Vulnerabilities.cvss as CVSS | stats earliest(_time) as et latest(_time) as lt by Host CVE Signature CVSS | convert timeformat=%m/%d/%Y ctime(et) as "Earliest Time" ctime(lt) as "Latest Time" | eval Age = round((lt-et)/86400,1) | search Age>=$min_age_tok$ Age<=$max_age_tok$ | eval Age = Age."|".'CVSS' | table Host CVE CVSS Signature "Earliest Time" "Latest Time" Age | sort - CVSS Age $time_tok_tab.earliest$ $time_tok_tab.latest$ 0,

Title: Web Proxy Categorization Flow - Sankey
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <input type="multiselect" token="category_tok" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Categories</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <default>Information Technology,Reference Materials,Miscellaneous</default>

  <valuePrefix>Web.category="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <fieldForLabel>Web.category</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>Web.category</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Web where nodename=Web.Proxy by Web.category</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  </input>

  <viz type="sankey_diagram_app.sankey_diagram">

  <title>Web Proxy Categorization Flow - Sankey</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Web where nodename=Web.Proxy AND $category_tok$ AND Web.user != "-" by Web.user, Web.category, Web.url prestats=t

 | rename Web.user as user Web.category as category Web.url as url

 | eval domain = replace(url, "^(\w+:\/\/?[^\/]+)(.*)","\1/")

 | stats count by user, category, domain

 | appendpipe

  [ stats count by user, category

  | rename user as source, category as target]

 | appendpipe

  [ stats count by category, domain

  | rename category as source, domain as target]

 | search source=*

 | fields source target count</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  <option name="height">809</option>

  <option name="trellis.enabled">0</option>

Title: Web Proxy Categorization Flow - Sankey
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <input type="multiselect" token="category_tok" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Categories</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <default>Information Technology,Reference Materials,Miscellaneous</default>

  <valuePrefix>Web.category="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <fieldForLabel>Web.category</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>Web.category</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Web where nodename=Web.Proxy by Web.category</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  </input>

  <viz type="sankey_diagram_app.sankey_diagram">

  <title>Web Proxy Categorization Flow - Sankey</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Web where nodename=Web.Proxy AND $category_tok$ AND Web.user != "-" by Web.user, Web.category, Web.url prestats=t

 | rename Web.user as user Web.category as category Web.url as url

 | eval domain = replace(url, "^(\w+:\/\/?[^\/]+)(.*)","\1/")

 | stats count by user, category, domain

 | appendpipe

  [ stats count by user, category

  | rename user as source, category as target]

 | appendpipe

  [ stats count by category, domain

  | rename category as source, domain as target]

 | search source=*

 | fields source target count</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  <option name="drilldown">none</option>

  <option name="height">809</option>

  <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>

  <option name="trellis.enabled">0</option>

  <option name="trellis.scales.shared">1</option>

  <option name="trellis.size">medium</option>

  </viz>

  </panel>

Title: Local Authentication Outliers - Automated Detection
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <viz type="Splunk_ML_Toolkit.OutliersViz">

  <title>Local Authentication Outliers - Automated Detection</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Authentication by _time, Authentication.src span=1ms

 | rename Authentication.src as src

 | where (cidrmatch ("10.0.0.0/8",src)) OR (cidrmatch ("172.16.0.0/12",src)) OR (cidrmatch ("192.168.0.0/16",src)) OR (cidrmatch ("127.0.0.0/8",src))

 | timechart span=1hr count as auths

 | streamstats window=60 current=true avg("auths") as avg stdev("auths") as stdev

 | fillnull value=0

 | eval lowerBound=if((avg-stdev*exact(2))>0,(avg-stdev*exact(2)),0)

 | eval upperBound=(avg+stdev*exact(2))

 | eval isOutlier=if('auths' < lowerBound OR 'auths' > upperBound, 1, 0)

 | fields _time, "auths", lowerBound, upperBound, isOutlier, *</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  <sampleRatio>1</sampleRatio>

  </search>

  <option name="Splunk_ML_Toolkit.OutliersViz.showOutlierCount">true</option>

  <option name="drilldown">none</option>

  <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>

  <option name="trellis.enabled">0</option>

  <option name="trellis.scales.shared">1</option>

  <option name="trellis.size">medium</option>

Title: Free Disk Space - Chart
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <title>Free Disk Space - Chart</title>

  <input type="multiselect" token="host">

  <label>Host</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <prefix>(</prefix>

  <suffix>)</suffix>

  <valuePrefix>Host="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <fieldForValue>Host</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Performance where nodename=All_Performance.Storage by All_Performance.dest All_Performance.Storage.storage_free

 | eval critical_level=500

 | eval free_mb = 'All_Performance.Storage.storage_free'/1000000

 | search free_mb != ''

 | rename All_Performance.dest as Host

 | stats avg(free_mb) as "Average_Free", median(free_mb) as "Median_Free_MB", max(free_mb) as "Maximum_Free_MB", avg(critical_level) as "Critical_Level_MB" by Host

 | eval "Average Free"=round(Average_Free,0)

 | eval "Median Free MB"=round(Median_Free_MB,0)

 | eval "Maximum Free MB"=round(Maximum_Free_MB,0)

 | eval "Critical Level MB"=round(Critical_Level_MB,0)

 | table Host "Average Free" "Median Free MB" "Maximum Free MB" "Critical Level MB" | search $host$</query>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  <title>Configuration Management - Servers - Unapproved Software - Count</title>

 | rename All_Inventory.vendor_product AS product, All_Inventory.dest as host

Title: Malware Protection - Hosts with Multiple Infections
Description: Malware Protection - Hosts with Multiple Infections
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <input type="multiselect" token="signature_tok_three" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Signature(s)</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <default>*</default>

  <prefix>(</prefix>

  <suffix>)</suffix>

  <valuePrefix>Malware_Attacks.signature="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <fieldForLabel>Malware_Attacks.signature</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>Malware_Attacks.signature</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Malware by Malware_Attacks.signature</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  </input>

  <input type="multiselect" token="dest_tok" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Destination(s)</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <default>*</default>

  <prefix>(</prefix>

  <suffix>)</suffix>

  <valuePrefix>Malware_Attacks.dest="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <fieldForLabel>Malware_Attacks.dest</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>Malware_Attacks.dest</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Malware by Malware_Attacks.dest</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  </input>

  <single>

  <title>Malware Protection - Hosts with Multiple Infections</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats dc(Malware_Attacks.signature) from datamodel=Malware where $signature_tok_three$ AND $dest_tok$ by Malware_Attacks.dest | rename Malware_Attacks.dest as dest dc(Malware_Attacks.signature) as sum_signatures | eval multi_infections = if(sum_signatures > 1, 1, 0) | stats sum(multi_infections) | rename sum(multi_infections) AS Endpoints</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  <option name="colorBy">value</option>

  <option name="colorMode">none</option>

  <option name="drilldown">none</option>

  <option name="height">250</option>

  <option name="numberPrecision">0</option>

  <option name="rangeColors">["0x53a051","0x0877a6","0xf8be34","0xf1813f","0xdc4e41"]</option>

  <option name="rangeValues">[0,30,70,100]</option>

  <option name="showSparkline">1</option>

  <option name="showTrendIndicator">1</option>

  <option name="trellis.enabled">0</option>

  <option name="trellis.scales.shared">1</option>

  <option name="trellis.size">medium</option>

  <option name="trendColorInterpretation">standard</option>

  <option name="trendDisplayMode">absolute</option>

  <option name="underLabel">Endpoints with Multiple Infections</option>

  <option name="unitPosition">after</option>

  <option name="useColors">0</option>

  <option name="useThousandSeparators">1</option>

  </single>

  </panel>

Title: Percentage of Systems with Vulnerabilities - Based on Enterprise-wide Scan Results
Description: Percentage of Systems with Vulnerabilities - Based on Enterprise-wide Scan Results
XML Definition:
<panel>

  <input type="multiselect" token="severity_tok" searchWhenChanged="true">

  <label>Vulnerability Severity</label>

  <choice value="*">All</choice>

  <change>

  <set token="title_label">$label$</set>

  </change>

  <delimiter> OR </delimiter>

  <prefix>(</prefix>

  <suffix>)</suffix>

  <valuePrefix>Vulnerabilities.severity="</valuePrefix>

  <valueSuffix>"</valueSuffix>

  <fieldForLabel>Vulnerabilities.severity</fieldForLabel>

  <fieldForValue>Vulnerabilities.severity</fieldForValue>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Vulnerabilities by Vulnerabilities.severity</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

  <default>critical, high</default>

  </input>

  <single>

  <title>Percentage of Systems with Vulnerabilities - Based on Enterprise-wide Scan Results</title>

  <search>

  <query>| tstats dc(Vulnerabilities.dest) as all_systems_scanned FROM datamodel=Vulnerabilities

 | appendcols [| tstats dc(Vulnerabilities.dest) as vulnerable FROM datamodel=Vulnerabilities where $severity_tok$]

 | eval percent_vuln = (vulnerable/all_systems_scanned)*100

 | top percent_vuln</query>

  <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>

  <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

  </search>

Title: 10 Least Common Remote Authentication Attempts
XML Definition: 10 Least Common Remote Authentication Attempts | tstats count from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.src!="10.0.0.0/8" AND Authentication.src!="172.16.0.0/12" AND Authentication.src!="192.168.0.0/16" by _time, Authentication.action, Authentication.app, Authentication.src, Authentication.user | sort 0 +count | head 10 | eval Time = strftime(_time, "%Y-%d-%m %H:%M:%S") | rename Authentication.action as Action Authentication.app as App Authentication.src as Source Authentication.user as User count as Count | table Time Action App Source User Count $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Web Proxy Categorization Flow - Table
XML Definition: Web Proxy Categorization Flow - Table All * " " category category | tstats count from datamodel=Web where nodename=Web.Proxy AND Web.user != "-" by Web.category | rename Web.category as category $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$ * Web Proxy Categorization Flow | tstats count from datamodel=Web where nodename=Web.Proxy AND Web.user != "-" AND Web.category=$category$ by Web.user, Web.category, Web.url prestats=t , _time | rename Web.user as user Web.category as category Web.url as url | stats count by user, category, url, _time | rename user as User, category as Category, url as URL $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Azure AD Audit - Data Inventory
XML Definition: Azure AD Audit - Data Inventory | tstats count from | tstats count from datamodel=VendorSpecific_Data_Inventory.VendorSpecific_Data where nodename=VendorSpecific_Data.Azure_AD_Auditt by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition: Paired DNS Queries and Responses - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=DNS_Data_Inventory.DNS where nodename=DNS.Paired_DNS_Queries_and_Responses by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition: Vendor-Specific Data - AWS CloudWatch Kubernetes Audit - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=VendorSpecific_Data_Inventory.VendorSpecific_Data where nodename=VendorSpecific_Data.AWS_CloudWatch_Kubernetes_Audit by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Azure Audit - Trend of Number of Events
Description: Azure Audit - Trend of Number of Events
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <chart>
        <title>Azure Audit - Trend of Number of Events</title>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats count as events from datamodel=VendorSpecific_Data_Inventory.VendorSpecific_Data where nodename=VendorSpecific_Data.Azure_Audit by _time

          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>

        <option name="charting.chart">line</option>
        <option name="charting.drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
      </chart>
    </panel>

XML Definition: Network Communication - Basic Traffic Logs - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=Network_Communication_Data_Inventory.Network_Communication where nodename=Network_Communication.Basic_Traffic_Logs by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition: VendorSpecific Data - Okta - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=VendorSpecific_Data_Inventory.VendorSpecific_Data where nodename=VendorSpecific_Data.Windows_Security_Logs by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition: Endpoint Detection and Response - Process Launch - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=Endpoint_Detection_and_Response_Data_Inventory.Endpoint_Detection_and_Response where nodename=Endpoint_Detection_and_Response.Process_Launch_with_Executable_Hash by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition: Network Communication - User-aware Traffic Logs - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=Network_Communication_Data_Inventory.Network_Communication where nodename=Network_Communication.Useraware_Traffic_Logs by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition: Application Data - Application Logs - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=Application_Data_Inventory.Application_Data where nodename=Application_Data.Application_Logs by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition: Failed Authentication - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=Authentication_Data_Inventory.Authentication where nodename=Authentication.Failed_Authentication by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition: Vendor-Specific Data - AWS CloudWatch Kubernetes Audit - Data Inventory | tstats count from datamodel=VendorSpecific_Data_Inventory.VendorSpecific_Data where nodename=VendorSpecific_Data.AWS_CloudWatch_Kubernetes_Audit by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

XML Definition:

XML Definition: GCP Logs - Trend of Number of Events | tstats count from datamodel=VendorSpecific_Data_Inventory.VendorSpecific_Data where nodename=VendorSpecific_Data.GCP_Logs by index, sourcetype | join index [| rest /services/admin/indexes | eval frozenTimePeriodInDays=frozenTimePeriodInSecs/60/60/24 | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | eval "Retention Cold"=round(frozenTimePeriodInDays/30,0) | eval "Retention Warm"=round(maxHotSpanDays/30,0) | eval maxHotSpanDays=maxHotSpanSecs/60/60/24 | rename title as index | table index,"Retention Cold" "Retention Warm"] | eval RetentionWarmStatus=if('Retention Warm'>12,"Good","Poor") | eval RetentionColdStatus=if('Retention Cold'>(18+12),"Good","Poor") | eval DataSourceCoverageStatus=if((count > 0), "Good","Poor") | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | eval StatusScore=0,StatusScoreMax=0, StatusComment="" | foreach *Status [| eval StatusScore=StatusScore+case('<<FIELD>>'="Good", 1,'<<FIELD>>'="Mixed", 0.5,'<<FIELD>>'="Poor",0, 1=1,0) | eval StatusScoreMax=StatusScoreMax+1 | eval StatusComment=mvappend(StatusComment, case( '<<FIELD>>'="Good", null(), "<<FIELD>>"="DataSourceCoverageStatus","• Data Source \""+data_source_category+"\" is missing data.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionWarmStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Warm'+" months warm retention.", "<<FIELD>>"="RetentionColdStatus","• Index \""+index+"\" has only "+'Retention Cold'+" months cold retention." )) ] | rename DataSourceCoverageStatus AS "Data Coverage", RetentionWarmStatus AS "Warm Retention", RetentionColdStatus AS "Cold Retention", data_source_category AS "Data Source", StatusComment AS "Comment", count as "Number of Events" | table sourcetype, "Number of Events", "Data Coverage" "Warm Retention" "Cold Retention" Comment $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Windows Installed Updates - Timechart
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <chart>
        <title>Windows Installed Updates - Timechart</title>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats dc(Updates.dest) as count FROM datamodel=Updates where Updates.vendor_product="Microsoft Windows" AND Updates.status=installed by _time</query>
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="charting.chart">line</option>
        <option name="charting.drilldown">none</option>
      </chart>
    </panel>

Title: Hosts that haven't been updates in more than 30 days
Description: Hosts that haven't been updates in more than 30 days
XML Definition: Hosts that haven't been updates in more than 30 days | tstats max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Updates where Updates.status=Installed Updates.vendor_product="Microsoft Windows" by Updates.dest Updates.status Updates.vendor_product | rename Updates.dest as Host | rename Updates.status as "Update Status" | rename Updates.vendor_product as Product | eval isOutlier=if(lastTime <= relative_time(now(), "-30d@d"), 1, 0) | search isOutlier=1 | rename lastTime as "Last Update Time", | table Host, "Update Status", Product, "Last Update Time" -30d@d now

Title: Updates that haven't been installed in the last 30 days
Description: Updates that haven't been installed in the last 30 days
XML Definition: Updates that haven't been installed in the last 30 days | tstats latest(Updates.status) as status from datamodel=Updates.Updates where earliest=-30d@d latest=+0s by _time,Updates.dest,Updates.vendor_product,Updates.signature_id, Updates.signature, Updates.severity | rename "Updates.*" as * | search status = available | rename dest as Host, signature_id as "Update aID", vendor_product as Product, signature as Description, severity as Severity | fields - status -30d@d now

Title: Average Number of Days to Update (Last 30 Days)
Description: Average Number of Days to Update (Last 30 Days)
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <single>
        <title>Average Number of Days to Update (Last 30 Days)</title>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Updates.Updates by _time,Updates.dest,Updates.vendor_product,Updates.signature_id, Updates.signature, Updates.status span=1s
| rename "Updates.*" as *
| transaction dest, signature_id
| search status = available status=installed
| stats avg(duration) as duration
| eval duration_days=duration/86400
| fields duration_days</query>
          <earliest>-30d@d</earliest>
          <latest>now</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="numberPrecision">0</option>
        <option name="rangeColors">["0x53a051","0x0877a6","0xf8be34","0xf1813f","0xdc4e41"]</option>
        <option name="unit">Days</option>
      </single>
    </panel>

Title: Average Time to Update by Host (Last 30 Days)
Description: Average Time to Update by Host (Last 30 Days)
XML Definition: Average Time to Update by Host (Last 30 Days) | tstats count from datamodel=Updates.Updates by _time,Updates.dest,Updates.vendor_product,Updates.signature_id, Updates.signature, Updates.status span=1s | rename "Updates.*" as * | transaction dest, signature_id | search status = available status=installed | stats avg(duration) as duration by dest | eval duration_rounded=round(tonumber(duration),2) | eval field_in_hhmmss=tostring(duration_rounded, "duration") | rename field_in_hhmmss as Duration, dest as Host | rex field=Duration "(?<days>\d?)\+?(?<rest>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}.\d{2})" | eval days = if(days != "",days,0) | eval Duration = days." Days ".rest | table Host, Duration -30d@d now

XML Definition: Hosts that haven't been updates in more than 30 days | tstats max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Updates where Updates.status=Installed Updates.vendor_product="Microsoft Windows" by Updates.dest Updates.status Updates.vendor_product | rename Updates.dest as Host | rename Updates.status as "Update Status" | rename Updates.vendor_product as Product | eval isOutlier=if(lastTime <= relative_time(now(), "-30d@d"), 1, 0) | search isOutlier=1 | rename lastTime as "Last Update Time", | table Host, "Update Status", Product, "Last Update Time" -30d@d now

Title: Updates that haven't been installed in the last 30 days
Description: Updates that haven't been installed in the last 30 days
XML Definition: Updates that haven't been installed in the last 30 days | tstats latest(Updates.status) as status from datamodel=Updates.Updates where earliest=-30d@d latest=+0s by _time,Updates.dest,Updates.vendor_product,Updates.signature_id, Updates.signature, Updates.severity | rename "Updates.*" as * | search status = available | rename dest as Host, signature_id as "Update aID", vendor_product as Product, signature as Description, severity as Severity | fields - status -30d@d now

Title: Average Number of Days to Update (Last 30 Days)
Description: Average Number of Days to Update (Last 30 Days)
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <single>
        <title>Average Number of Days to Update (Last 30 Days)</title>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Updates.Updates by _time,Updates.dest,Updates.vendor_product,Updates.signature_id, Updates.signature, Updates.status span=1s
| rename "Updates.*" as *
| transaction dest, signature_id
| search status = available status=installed
| stats avg(duration) as duration
| eval duration_days=duration/86400
| fields duration_days</query>
          <earliest>-30d@d</earliest>
          <latest>now</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="numberPrecision">0</option>
        <option name="rangeColors">["0x53a051","0x0877a6","0xf8be34","0xf1813f","0xdc4e41"]</option>
        <option name="unit">Days</option>
      </single>
    </panel>

Title: Average Time to Update by Host (Last 30 Days)
Description: Average Time to Update by Host (Last 30 Days)
XML Definition: Average Time to Update by Host (Last 30 Days) | tstats count from datamodel=Updates.Updates by _time,Updates.dest,Updates.vendor_product,Updates.signature_id, Updates.signature, Updates.status span=1s | rename "Updates.*" as * | transaction dest, signature_id | search status = available status=installed | stats avg(duration) as duration by dest | eval duration_rounded=round(tonumber(duration),2) | eval field_in_hhmmss=tostring(duration_rounded, "duration") | rename field_in_hhmmss as Duration, dest as Host | rex field=Duration "(?<days>\d?)\+?(?<rest>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}.\d{2})" | eval days = if(days != "",days,0) | eval Duration = days." Days ".rest | table Host, Duration -30d@d now

Title: Windows Installed Updates - Timechart
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <chart>
        <title>Windows Installed Updates - Timechart</title>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats dc(Updates.dest) as count FROM datamodel=Updates where Updates.vendor_product="Microsoft Windows" AND Updates.status=installed by _time</query>
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="charting.chart">line</option>
        <option name="charting.drilldown">none</option>
      </chart>
    </panel>

Title: Windows Installed Updates - Table
XML Definition: Windows Installed Updates - Table | tstats dc(Updates.dest) as count FROM datamodel=Updates where Updates.vendor_product="Microsoft Windows" AND Updates.status=installed by _time, Updates.dest, Updates.signature, Updates.severity | table _time, Updates.dest, Updates.signature, Updates.severity | rename Updates.dest as Host, Updates.signature as Signature, Updates.severity as Severity $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Software and Patch Updates
XML Definition: Software and Patch Updates | tstats count from datamodel=Updates by Updates.dest, Updates.status, Updates.vendor_product, Updates.signature | fields - count | rename Updates.dest as Host, Updates.status as "Status", Updates.vendor_product as "Product" Updates.signature as "Signature" $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$

Title: Blocked Web Advertisements
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <title>Blocked Web Advertisements</title>
      <single>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats  count from datamodel=Web where (nodename=Web.Proxy (Web.category=*advertisement*) Web.action=blocked) by _time</query>
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
          <sampleRatio>1</sampleRatio>
        </search>
        <option name="colorBy">trend</option>
        <option name="colorMode">block</option>
        <option name="drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="numberPrecision">0</option>
        <option name="rangeColors">["0x65a637","0x6db7c6","0xf7bc38","0xf58f39","0xd93f3c"]</option>
        <option name="rangeValues">[0,30,70,100]</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
        <option name="showSparkline">1</option>
        <option name="showTrendIndicator">1</option>
        <option name="trendColorInterpretation">inverse</option>
        <option name="trendDisplayMode">absolute</option>
        <option name="unitPosition">after</option>
        <option name="useColors">1</option>
        <option name="useThousandSeparators">1</option>
      </single>
    </panel>

Title: Allowed Web Advertisements
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <title>Allowed Web Advertisements</title>
      <single>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats  count from datamodel=Web where (nodename=Web.Proxy (Web.category=*advertisement* OR Web.dest=*ads*) Web.action=allowed) by _time</query>
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="colorBy">trend</option>
        <option name="colorMode">block</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
        <option name="trendColorInterpretation">inverse</option>
        <option name="trendDisplayMode">percent</option>
        <option name="useColors">1</option>
      </single>
    </panel>

Title: Active Content Activity
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <title>Active Content Activity</title>
      <chart>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats  count from datamodel=Web where (nodename=Web.Proxy (Web.http_content_type=*Shockwave* OR Web.http_content_type=*Flash* OR Web.http_user_agent="Java*" OR http_user_agent="*flash")) by _time, Web.action
|  chart max(count) as count over _time by Web.action</query>
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="charting.chart">area</option>
        <option name="charting.chart.stackMode">stacked</option>
        <option name="charting.drilldown">all</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
      </chart>
    </panel>

Title: Blocked Flash and Shockwave by Domain
Description: Blocked Flash and Shockwave by Domain
XML Definition: Blocked Flash and Shockwave by Domain | tstats values(Web.user) as user values(Web.src) as host values(Web.http_content_type) as "Content Type" values(Web.http_user_agent) as "User-Agent" count from datamodel=Web where (nodename=Web.Proxy (Web.http_content_type=*Shockwave* OR Web.http_content_type=*Flash* OR Web.http_user_agent="Java*" OR http_user_agent="*flash") Web.action=blocked) by Web.dest | sort -count | rename Web.dest as Domain, host as Source, user as User $time_tok.earliest$ $time_tok.latest$ 1

Title: Deleted Accounts
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <title>Deleted Accounts</title>
      <single>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats  count AS "Count of Created Accounts" from datamodel=Change where (nodename = All_Changes.Account_Management.Accounts_Deleted) by _time</query>
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
          <sampleRatio>1</sampleRatio>
        </search>
        <option name="colorBy">trend</option>
        <option name="colorMode">block</option>
        <option name="drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="numberPrecision">0</option>
        <option name="rangeColors">["0x65a637","0x6db7c6","0xf7bc38","0xf58f39","0xd93f3c"]</option>
        <option name="rangeValues">[0,30,70,100]</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
        <option name="showSparkline">1</option>
        <option name="showTrendIndicator">1</option>
        <option name="trendColorInterpretation">inverse</option>
        <option name="trendDisplayMode">percent</option>
        <option name="trendInterval">-1h</option>
        <option name="unitPosition">after</option>
        <option name="useColors">1</option>
        <option name="useThousandSeparators">1</option>
      </single>
    </panel>

Title: Hosts not updated > 7 Days
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <title>Hosts not updated >7 Days</title>
      <single>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats min(_time) as _time,latest(Updates.dest_should_update) as dest_should_update from datamodel=Updates.Updates where earliest=-1y@d latest=+0s Updates.status=installed by Updates.dest,Updates.signature_id,Updates.vendor_product | `drop_dm_object_name("Updates")` | stats max(_time) as lastTime by dest | eval dayDiff=round((now()-lastTime)/86400,1) | search dayDiff>7 | sort + lastTime | eval lastTime=strftime(lastTime,"%d/%m/%y %H:%M:%S") | stats count(dest)</query>
          <earliest>-7d@h</earliest>
          <latest>now</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
      </single>
    </panel>

Title: Multifactor Authentication Attempts By App
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <title>Multifactor Authentication Attempts By App</title>
      <chart>
        <title>Distinct Users</title>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats dc(Authentication.user) as Distinct from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.tag=multifactor by _time, Authentication.app
| timechart partial=false useother=false max(Distinct) as Distinct by Authentication.app
| rename Distinct as "Distinct Count"
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
          <sampleRatio>1</sampleRatio>
        </search>
        <option name="charting.chart">area</option>
        <option name="charting.drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
      </chart>
    </panel>

Title: Software Inventory - Internet-Facing Servers - Unapproved Software - Count
Description: Software Inventory - Internet-Facing Servers - Unapproved Software - Count
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <single>
        <title>Software Inventory - Internet-Facing Servers - Unapproved Software - Count</title>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Compute_Inventory where nodename=All_Inventory.OS All_Inventory.vendor_product=* by All_Inventory.vendor_product, All_Inventory.dest
| rename All_Inventory.vendor_product AS product, All_Inventory.dest as host
| lookup system_list system_name AS host | search is_internet_facing_server = 1 system_id=$system_id$
| dedup product
| lookup approved_software_servers product AS product
| mvexpand is_approved
| eval approval_status = if(is_approved == 1, 1, 0)
| stats count by approval_status
| search approval_status = 0
| stats sum(count)
| rename sum(count) AS Unapproved_Vendor_Product_Instances</query>
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="colorBy">value</option>
        <option name="colorMode">block</option>
        <option name="drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="height">115</option>
        <option name="numberPrecision">0</option>
        <option name="rangeColors">["0xf8be34","0xf1813f","0xdc4e41"]</option>
        <option name="rangeValues">[5,10]</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
        <option name="showSparkline">1</option>
        <option name="showTrendIndicator">1</option>
        <option name="trellis.enabled">0</option>
        <option name="trellis.scales.shared">1</option>
        <option name="trellis.size">medium</option>
        <option name="trendColorInterpretation">standard</option>
        <option name="trendDisplayMode">absolute</option>
        <option name="underLabel">Count of Unapproved Software Products</option>
        <option name="unitPosition">after</option>
        <option name="useColors">1</option>
        <option name="useThousandSeparators">1</option>
      </single>
    </panel>

Title: Software Inventory - Non-internet-facing Servers - Unapproved Software - Count
Description: Software Inventory - Non-internet-facing Servers - Unapproved Software - Count
XML Definition:
<panel>
      <single>
        <title>Software Inventory - Non-internet-facing Servers - Unapproved Software - Count</title>
        <search>
          <query>| tstats count from datamodel=Compute_Inventory where nodename=All_Inventory.OS All_Inventory.vendor_product=* by All_Inventory.vendor_product, All_Inventory.dest
| rename All_Inventory.vendor_product AS product, All_Inventory.dest as host
| lookup system_list system_name AS host | search is_non_internet_facing_server = 1 system_id=$system_id$
| dedup product
| lookup approved_software_servers product AS product
| mvexpand is_approved
| eval approval_status = if(is_approved == 1, 1, 0)
| stats count by approval_status
| search approval_status = 0
| stats sum(count)
| rename sum(count) AS Unapproved_Vendor_Product_Instances</query>
          <earliest>$time_tok.earliest$</earliest>
          <latest>$time_tok.latest$</latest>
        </search>
        <option name="colorBy">value</option>
        <option name="colorMode">block</option>
        <option name="drilldown">none</option>
        <option name="height">115</option>
        <option name="numberPrecision">0</option>
        <option name="rangeColors">["0xf8be34","0xf1813f","0xdc4e41"]</option>
        <option name="rangeValues">[5,10]</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
        <option name="showSparkline">1</option>
        <option name="showTrendIndicator">1</option>
        <option name="trellis.enabled">0</option>
        <option name="trellis.scales.shared">1</option>
        <option name="trellis.size">medium</option>
        <option name="trendColorInterpretation">standard</option>
        <option name="trendDisplayMode">absolute</option>
        <option name="underLabel">Count of Unapproved Software Products</option>
        <option name="unitPosition">after</option>
        <option name="useColors">1</option>
        <option name="useThousandSeparators">1</option>
      </single>
    </panel>

        <option name="mapping.map.center">(0,0)</option>
        <option name="mapping.map.panning">1</option>
        <option name="mapping.map.scrollZoom">0</option>
        <option name="mapping.map.zoom">2</option>
        <option name="mapping.markerLayer.markerMaxSize">50</option>
        <option name="mapping.markerLayer.markerMinSize">10</option>

        <option name="mapping.type">marker</option>
        <option name="refresh.display">progressbar</option>
      </map>
    </panel>
